Assessment Encounter AssessmentAssessment LastModifiedOrganizationLastModified Date Date by Details Time 02/16/2026 02/16/2026 Impression: mgreener1 Not 02/16/2026 2 weeks status post L4-5 laminectomy and decompression on 2/2/2026 at BUMCP with Dr. available 12:39:48 Chutkan. Plan: Patient is doing very well following surgery. He was discharged to a rehab facility and has completed 2 sessions of intensive physical therapy and is now being discharged. He reports that after surgery he had a ground-level fall and underwent a CT scan at the ER. I reviewed the CT scan today and he has a chronic compression fracture but otherwise no acute findings. Today patient reports that his preoperative back pain has significantly improved. He is having postsurgical pain only. He is not taking any pain medication. On exam today patients incision appears to be healing well. We have discussed activity restrictions during the postoperative period. Patient will follow up with Dr. Chutkan in 4 weeks, no need for xrays at that time.
